headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Overweight on DTE Energy, Lowers Price Target to $155
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst David Arcaro   maintains DTE Energy (NYSE:DTE) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $156 to $155.

headline: Truist Securities Initiates Coverage On DTE Energy with Buy Rating, Announces Price Target of $165
